unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My brother has never been abroad before, so he is finding this trip very exciting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 一口赛艇(exciting)在飞驰，这场景太令人兴奋了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 阿姨(re)晒衣物(ceive)，收到一份快递。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is working for a big firm and he has already visited a great number of different places in Australia.

unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 堤分人头(different)，不同的人有不同的打扮。
